boundary_binding.action_boundary: May logistics release the controlled export shipment?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match on destination; license specifies Peru but shipment specifies Chile
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: LIC-SIE-073 destination Peru vs SHIP-SIE-073 destination Chile
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Destination mismatch blocks closure per exact-match policy (STD-SIE-073-P)
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Timing matches (2026-06-28), scope matches (ECCN 3A991, end user Andes Labs), authority matches (license effective before export), but destination fails exact-match requirement

final_answer: The action cannot proceed. License LIC-SIE-073 authorizes export to Peru, but shipment SHIP-SIE-073 specifies Chile as destination. This critical mismatch blocks source-boundary closure per policy STD-SIE-073-P, which mandates exact match on destination before execution. No ambiguity resolution pathway exists; the shipment must either be redirected to Peru or a new license obtained. ESCALATE verdict stands.
open_blockers: Destination mismatch Chile vs Peru unresolved per STD-SIE-073-P exact-match requirement
Source boundary cannot close due to destination defect
